transcript: The Dragon Boat Festival has a history of more than 2,000 years. It is in memory of Qu Yuan, the great patriotic poet of Qu State during the Warring States period. He was upright, loyal, and highly esteemed for his wise counsel that brought peace and prosperity to the state. But he was maliciously accused by the traitorsurers and was exiled. When Zhou was conquered, Qiu Yun was in deep sorrow. On the fifth day of the fifth lunar month, he committed suicide by drowning himself into the Milu River. In order to commemorate Qiu, people named the fifth day of May as Dragon Boat Festival. On this day, people eat Zongzi and hold dragon boat races. Zongzi is the glutinous rice pudding. Ingredients such as beans, lotuses, pork, and the golden yolk of a marinated duck egg are often added. The pudding is then wrapped with bamboo leaves, bound with a can of wrapper and boiled in water for hours. This is the Chinese Dragon Boat Festival. SmallRig wishes you have a good Dragon Boat Festival!
